title: Hot Flashes and Mood Changes - Menopause
chief_complaint: 51-year-old with hot flashes, night sweats, mood swings, vaginal dryness, and irregular periods for 8 months. Last menstrual period 4 months ago. No contraindications to HRT.
key_learning_points: Lowest effective dose for shortest duration

patient_responses.flashes: I get hot flashes 10-15 times a day
patient_responses.mood: I feel irritable and cry easily

feedback.correct_message: Well diagnosed! Menopause with vasomotor symptoms.
feedback.incorrect_message: This is menopause. The FSH >40 + symptoms confirm it.
feedback.attending_note: Menopause: HRT (estrogen + progesterone) for moderate-severe symptoms in women <60 without contraindications. Lowest effective dose, shortest duration. Vaginal estrogen for GSM. Non-hormonal options if HRT contraindicated.
